testimonials.quote: LeaseShield got my rent capped at 3% and 48-hour entry notice added. The scripts made it easy.
testimonials.name: Sarah Chen
testimonials.title: Marketing Manager

testimonials.quote: They added a fair break clause with 8 weeks’ notice and a one-month fee. Peace of mind is worth it.
testimonials.name: Jamal Robinson
testimonials.title: Product Designer
testimonials.result: Secured clean exit terms before signing

testimonials.quote: Our deposit came back in full. Their move-out checklist and dispute template shut down two bogus charges.
testimonials.name: Priya Nair
testimonials.title: Grad Student

testimonials.quote: I thought landlords never negotiate. With their email language, mine agreed to cap late fees and clarify repairs.
testimonials.name: Daniel Ruiz
testimonials.title: Sales Associate
